title: hieracium murorum subsp. obtusidens
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. obtusidens, also known as a species of Hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Hieracium murorum subsp. obtusidens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, this plant can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or applied topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
